## Unordered Lists

- Item one
- Item two
- Item three

* Star item one
* Star item two

+ Plus item one
+ Plus item two

## Ordered Lists

1. First item
2. Second item
3. Third item

## Nested Lists

- Parent item
  - Child item
    - Grandchild item
  - Another child
- Another parent

## Mixed Nesting

1. Ordered parent
   - Unordered child
   - Another child
     1. Deeply nested ordered
     2. Second nested ordered
2. Second ordered parent

## Multi-line List Items

- This is a list item that has
  multiple lines of content
  spanning three lines.

- This item has a paragraph.

  And another paragraph within the same item.
